languages.scope: razor parser random public-repo validation uses the first three passing GitHub repos from deterministic shuffled public non-archived repo searches for Razor, cshtml, blazor, and C# with 50..500 stars and size <= 9000, filtered to .razor/.cshtml files. Atlas indexed each clean checkout after removing graphify-out, the native denominator came from the Razor directive/component source counter, and Graphify was run on the same checkout as the comparison baseline.
languages.selectionMethod: gh search repos for razor, cshtml, blazor, and C# --stars 50..500 --archived=false --limit 100 each; size <= 9000; deterministic shuffled sample seed 2026-06-30-atlas-random-validation-remaining-v1; filter for .razor/.cshtml files; first 3 passing repos
languages.measurementOrder: Atlas index after removing graphify-out, then language-specific parser/source counter, then graphify update for comparison metrics. Atlas/Graphify candidates time out after 75s and are rejected.
